content.problemStatement:
Given a `N x M` matrix, sort its elements diagonally.
For eg. see the following matrix and its diagonal sorting:




Input Format

The first line of input will contain two space separated integers NNN and MMM, denoting the no. of rows and columns in the input matrix.
Next NNN lines contains MMM space separated integers, the elements of the matrix.


Output Format

Output NNN lines, each containing MMM space separated integers, the elements of diagonally sorted matrix.
constraints: The elements of the matrix are non-negative and won't exceed 100010001000.
